title: Decompose large pipelines with child pipelines
description: Split monorepo or multi-component builds into triggered child pipelines for isolation, parallelism, and clearer rules.
body: Use when a single .gitlab-ci.yml grows unwieldy or a monorepo needs per-component pipelines. Do not cram unrelated components into one giant pipeline where every change runs everything, and do not let a child pipeline inherit secrets it does not need. Actions: use trigger: with an include to spawn child pipelines per component, gate each with rules:changes on that component's paths, and pass only required variables down. Validation signals include only the changed component's child pipeline running and child jobs lacking unrelated secrets. Risk boundary: a child pipeline that inherits broad protected variables widens exposure; pass the minimum and review inheritance.
